subcodes.first_line: O fruit of the tree of the love of God! Render thanks unto thy Lord that thou hast grown from that tree of blessings, the tree of the knowledge of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره شجره محبت الله حمد کن خدا را که از ان دار پر برکت معرفت الله روایدی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
